name: 牛顿定律
subject: physics
domain_name: 运动力与能量 / Motion, Forces & Energy / Motion, Forces & Energy
curriculum_points:
1 Define speed as distance travelled per unit time; recall and use the equation
s
v =
t
2 Define velocity as speed in a given direction

3 Recall and use the equation 9 Define acceleration as change in velocity per unit time; recall and use the equation
total distance travelled ∆v
average speed = a =
total time taken ∆t
4 Sketch, plot and interpret distance–time and speed–time graphs

interactive_resources.description: PhET 力与运动基础：推拉小车观察加速度（中文版）
GeoGebra 牛顿第二定律 F=ma 参数调节

errors.description: 只记年代与名词，不能用史料与制度变迁解释历史进程。
把传说叙述与考古/文献证据混为一谈，未区分证据强度。

exercises.stem: 结合课标要求，说明「牛顿定律」的核心内涵，并各举一条史料或史实依据。
exercises.answer:
应答扣课标要点：1 Define speed as distance travelled per unit time; recall and use the equation
s
v =
t…；并区分证据类型（文献/考古/制度等）。

exercises.stem: 用因果链解释：2 Define velocity as speed in a given direction… 对理解「牛顿定律」为何重要？
exercises.answer: 需写出前因—制度/经济/思想变化—后果，避免只罗列年代。
